description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and runs a before_script installing system packages and Node tools: apt-get update -yq, apt-get install -y npm, apt-get install nodejs-legacy, apt-get install git, npm install -g bower grunt-cli, npm install, and bower install --allow-root. Define a build-project job that runs in the default stage, executes the script command grunt, and publishes the files under dist/* as job artifacts. The pipeline has no explicit stages, caches, or rules, relying on the default behavior.
